intro.description: Hi, I am Anwesha, a final year undergraduate student, majoring in Computer Science and Engineering. With a passion for system design and architecture, I have honed my skills through various projects and collaborations. My journey in the tech world has been fueled by curiosity and a relentless drive to learn and innovate. I am excited to share my work and connect with like-minded individuals who are passionate about technology and its potential to transform the world.

websiteSection.Designed By: Hand-coded with the precision of a lab tech and the heart of a wanderer.Good UX is like a 'well-mapped' trail through a complex forest. Every pixel was placed with care, every animation was crafted with affection, and every bug was... well, let's just say it's a feature!
websiteSection.futurePlans: The future plan is simple: My backpack is never truly empty, and my terminal is never truly closed. My future plans involve refining my expertise in high-level system architecture.
websiteSection.codeStory: Once upon a time, a coder fell in love with some code.A journey of transformation from the world of cells and microscopes to the realm of code, algorithms, and terminals. This is the story of embracing change, overcoming challenges, and discovering that your passion can evolve in unexpected and exciting ways.

techSection.heading: THE LOVEY CUTIEPIE
techSection.description: A system design enthusiast who views every codebase as an uncharted territory. From dissecting complex biological patterns to mapping out scalable software infrastructures, Anwesha builds with the precision of a scientist and the curiosity of a global traveler.
